title: Work product rule not affected
doc_html:
Art. 509.  Work product rule not affected

Nothing in this Chapter shall be construed as derogating from the protection afforded by the rules relating to work product.

Acts 1992, No. 376, §1, eff. Jan. 1, 1993.
